creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #24)
Hrm.  I thought so, its definitely still happening at:
FreeBSD 12.0-BETA3 (CLUSTER12) #0 r340050: Thu Nov  8 14:29:24 UTC 2018

I've dropped the crash files + kernel in my homedir on freefall again:
freefall.freebsd.org:~sbruno/ftpmirror.tar.gz

processor eflags        = resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 11 (idle: cpu0)
